notes: NI Kontakt 8 — general purpose sampler. CC mappings here are Kontakt's default Quick Control assignments. Each loaded instrument will have its own 8 Quick Controls with custom labels. Right-click any knob in Kontakt and choose 'Learn MIDI CC' for direct assignment. CC 7/10/11/64 always work regardless of loaded instrument.

Expression.description: Expression — many Kontakt instruments respond to CC 11 for dynamics

Soft Pedal.description: Soft pedal — many piano/keyboard instruments respond

Quick Control 1.description: Kontakt Quick Control 1 — check instrument's KC panel for label (right-click knob → Assign → MIDI CC)

Master Filter Cutoff.description: Kontakt master filter cutoff (if master filter is enabled in Options)

Reverb.description: Send reverb level (if Kontakt's internal effects are used)

Breath.description: Breath controller — used by some orchestral/wind instruments for dynamics
